title: Savannah Energy’s Uquo Field Sees 21% 2P Reserve Boost in FY 2024 - FinancialEDGE
description: Savannah Energy Plc, the British independent energy company focused around the delivery of Projects that Matter, has announced its unaudited results for the year ended 31 December 2024. The FY 2024 Unaudited Results show a Total Income of US$393.8 million, compared to US$289.8 million in FY 2023. This comprises of Total Revenues of US$258.9, compared
html: Savannah Energy Plc, the British independent energy company focused around the delivery of Projects that Matter, has announced its unaudited results for the year ended 31 December 2024.
